$schema: External tools configuration for Socket CLI VFS bundling
$comment: Build process uses @npmcli/arborist (scripts/sea-build-utils/npm-packages.mjs) to download npm packages with full dependency trees. npm packages are bundled with node_modules/ into VFS alongside security tool binaries. For github-release types, 'githubRelease' is the release tag (any format: v1.6.1, 3.11.14, etc.).

@coana-tech/cli.description: Coana CLI for static analysis and reachability detection

@cyclonedx/cdxgen.description: CycloneDX SBOM generator for software bill of materials

opengrep.description: OpenGrep SAST/code analysis engine (fork of Semgrep)

socket-basics.description: Socket Basics - integrated SAST, secret scanning, and container analysis

socket-patch.description: Socket Patch CLI for applying security patches (Rust binary)

sfw.description: Socket Firewall (sfw) - GitHub binary for SEA, npm package for CLI

synp.description: Tool for converting between yarn.lock and package-lock.json

trivy.description: Trivy container and filesystem vulnerability scanner
